name: Apple
description: Apple is a technology company designing consumer electronics, software, and services including the iPhone, Mac, iPad, and macOS.

years.notes: Rainbow Apple by Rob Janoff (six horizontal stripes: green, yellow, orange, red, purple, blue). Officially adopted in 1977 and used through 1998; the 1977 variant is identical to this mark and is therefore not separately committed.
Monochrome silhouette adopted after Steve Jobs's return, used through the Aqua / Mac OS X era with a glossy vertical gradient (dark to translucent).
